title: rankett.com — product/strategy junk-drawer, mid-Jan 2026
html:
TL;DR

A working junk-drawer for rankett mid-Jan 2026, modified through Jan 29. Three layers:

  1. A self-prompt about a tweet that "fucked me up" — Yahir asks himself to deep-think on whether the ai search optimization space he's been building in for months has merit, what the path is, who else is "truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul." Reads like he's grappling with someone else publicly staking the claim he's been working in privately.
  2. Product TODOs: add share of voice as a central score, "zoom clips," "trigger legal terms and conditions before they get a client (maybe on opening a new tab)," exportable whitelabeled report.
  3. whitelabel strategy checklist: agency logo on the audit tool, on email templates, on contracts, on the fulfillment bot. "We whitelabel AI search optimization" is the most explicit tagline-level statement in the note.

Closes with two unrelated personal lines — "Yo Charlie. Imma be out of town for" (mid-text, abandoned) and "Stepheven" (just a name).

Key quotes

"ok we have been working on a general AI visibility space for a few month now and have done a whole lot"

"Are there people out there rn that are truly pursuing this with all of their intention and soul?"

"We whitelabel ai search optimization"

"fix it so that we have the 'Share of voice' section. more of like a central score"

Why it matters in the graph

  • The clearest statement of rankett's category positioning (AI search optimization / visibility) and GTM (whitelabel through agencies) anywhere in the corpus so far.
  • Confirms Yahir is regularly asking AI to "deep think" alongside him — the note prompts a model rather than just listing todos. This is itself a workflow worth tracking.
  • The ai search optimization thesis traces backward through: 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream (where chatgpt wedge ideas were already being brainstormed weeks after launch) → asking the right question ("the next best skill to have") → nonobvious (his product filter).

Open questions

  • What was the tweet that "fucked me up"? — worth surfacing if a screenshot lives in raw/inbox/ or raw/articles/
  • "Charlie" and "Stepheven" — any context elsewhere?
  • Is there a pricing or revenue note for Rankett that pairs with this strategy note?
  • Does Rankett's whitelabel pricing track to the $5k/mo (Jun 2026) and $100k/mo (EOY 2026) targets in Memory?

Wikilinks

rankett · ai search optimization · share of voice · whitelabel strategy · chatgpt · asking the right question · nonobvious · disruption · aeo competitor arc · Memory
